lines.speaker: Dalila
lines.text: I hope the food's better here than it was last time.

lines.speaker: Perrdur
lines.text: I'm sure it will be, dear.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry to disturb you, but what are you two doing here?

lines.speaker: Dalila
lines.text: Perrdur and I are having a nice romantic dinner, aren't we dear?

lines.speaker: Dalila
lines.text: We are celebrating the anniversary of our marriage, aren't we dear?

lines.speaker: Dalila
lines.text: And we are having a very enjoyable time, aren't we dear?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Clearly. I'll let you two lovebirds carry on, then.
